title: stelis scaphoglossa
intro: Stelis scaphoglossa, also known as the "False Saffron Orchid," is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Stelis scaphoglossa include its potential to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis scaphoglossa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas.
